title: olearia moschata
intro: Olearia moschata, also known as sweet scented daisy or musk daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its flowers and leaves are used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Olearia moschata is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, and is said to have a sweet, musky fragrance.
